weapons.name: Combat Knife
weapons.description: A sturdy fixed-blade knife. Concealable.

weapons.name: Machete
weapons.description: Heavy chopping blade. Not subtle.

weapons.name: Baseball Bat
weapons.description: Aluminum or wood. Classic blunt weapon.

weapons.name: Sword (Katana)
weapons.description: Traditional Japanese blade. Elegant and deadly.

weapons.name: Sword (Longsword)
weapons.description: Medieval-style two-handed sword.

weapons.name: Stake (Wooden)
weapons.description: Sharpened wood. The Kindred's nightmare. Must target the heart.

weapons.name: Brass Knuckles
weapons.description: Metal fist reinforcement. Adds to unarmed damage.

weapons.name: Switchblade
weapons.description: Small folding knife. Easily concealed.

weapons.name: Fire Axe
weapons.description: Heavy axe. Can breach doors.

weapons.name: Light Pistol (9mm)
weapons.description: Glock 19, Beretta 92, or similar. Standard sidearm.

weapons.name: Heavy Pistol (.45)
weapons.description: Desert Eagle, Colt 1911. More stopping power.

weapons.name: Revolver (.38)
weapons.description: Simple, reliable. Six shots.

weapons.name: Shotgun (Pump)
weapons.description: Remington 870 or similar. Devastating at close range.

weapons.name: Shotgun (Sawed-off)
weapons.description: Concealable shotgun. Illegal. Very short range.

weapons.name: Submachine Gun
weapons.description: MP5, Uzi, or similar. Full-auto capable.

weapons.name: Assault Rifle
weapons.description: AR-15, AK-47. Military-grade.

weapons.name: Sniper Rifle
weapons.description: Bolt-action precision rifle. Extreme range.

weapons.name: Crossbow
weapons.description: Silent ranged weapon. Can fire wooden bolts.

weapons.name: Taser
weapons.description: Electroshock weapon. Ineffective against vampires but useful on mortals.

weapons.name: Throwing Knives (set)
weapons.description: Set of 3 balanced throwing knives.

weapons.name: Molotov Cocktail
weapons.description: Improvised incendiary. Deals Aggravated damage to vampires. Masquerade risk.

gear.name: Burner Phone
gear.description: Prepaid disposable phone. Untraceable.

gear.name: Smartphone
gear.description: Modern smartphone. GPS, camera, apps. Trackable.

gear.name: Laptop
gear.description: Standard laptop computer.

gear.name: Lockpick Set
gear.description: Professional lockpicking tools. Requires Larceny to use.

gear.name: First Aid Kit
gear.description: Basic medical supplies. Useless for vampires but good for mortal allies.

gear.name: Body Armor (Concealed)
gear.description: Kevlar vest worn under clothing. Reduces physical damage.

gear.name: Body Armor (Tactical)
gear.description: Full tactical vest with plates. Obvious. Reduces physical damage significantly.

gear.name: Night Vision Goggles
gear.description: Electronic NVG. See in darkness without Eyes of the Beast.

gear.name: Binoculars
gear.description: High-quality optics for surveillance.

gear.name: Forensics Kit
gear.description: Portable analysis tools. Fingerprinting, blood typing, evidence collection.

gear.name: Disguise Kit
gear.description: Makeup, wigs, prosthetics. +2 dice to disguise attempts.

gear.name: Handcuffs
gear.description: Steel handcuffs with key. Standard restraints.

gear.name: Zip Ties (pack)
gear.description: Disposable restraints. Quick to apply.

gear.name: Flashlight (Tactical)
gear.description: High-powered LED flashlight. Can be blinding.

gear.name: Rope (50ft)
gear.description: Nylon climbing rope.

gear.name: Crowbar
gear.description: Prying tool. Can also be used as an improvised weapon.

gear.name: Bolt Cutters
gear.description: Cut through chains, padlocks, and fences.

gear.name: Fire Extinguisher
gear.description: Useful for putting out fires — and Rotschreck situations.

gear.name: Blood Bags (pack of 5)
gear.description: Stolen or purchased medical blood bags. Slakes 1 Hunger each (BP 0-1 only).

gear.name: Fake ID
gear.description: Forged identification documents. Quality varies.

gear.name: Surveillance Camera Kit
gear.description: Wireless cameras with remote viewing app. 4 cameras.

gear.name: GPS Tracker
gear.description: Small magnetic GPS tracker. Monitor via phone app.

gear.name: Signal Jammer
gear.description: Blocks cell signals in a 20-meter radius. Illegal.

gear.name: Motorcycle
gear.description: Fast, maneuverable urban transportation.

gear.name: Sedan (Used)
gear.description: Reliable, inconspicuous four-door car.

gear.name: SUV
gear.description: Spacious vehicle. Room for the coterie.

gear.name: Van (Cargo)
gear.description: Windowless cargo van. Privacy for Kindred activities.

gear.name: Luxury Car
gear.description: High-end vehicle. Makes an impression.
